question_type: ["表格填空题", "单选题", "表格匹配题"]

content.cn_text: L =图书管理员M =麦琪(电话响了)
content.en_text: L = Librarian M = Mackie(Phone rings.)

content.cn_text: L:早上好，城市中央图书馆。我能为您效劳吗?
content.en_text: L: Good morning, City Central library . May I help you?

content.cn_text: M:是的。我想订购一些书籍和文章。你可以通过邮政或快递寄给我，对吗?
content.en_text: M: Yes. I want to order some books and copies of articles please. You can send them to me through the post or courier, can't you?

content.cn_text: L:当然可以。我去拿表格，记下一些细节。先说你的名字，先生。
content.en_text: L: Yes, certainly. I'll just get the form and take down some details . First your name please,sir.

content.cn_text: 男:比如莱斯特·麦基。这是M-A-C-K-I-E。
content.en_text: M: Example Lester Mackie. That's M-A-C-K-I-E.

content.cn_text: 丽莎:麦琪，莱斯特。还有您的会员号码。
content.en_text: L: Mackie, Lester. And your membership number. .

content.cn_text: M:这是m301。
content.en_text: M: That's M 301 .

content.cn_text: L:谢谢。现在请告诉我您的地址。这就是你要我们寄东西的地址。
content.en_text: L: Thank you. Now your address please. That's the address you want us to send the items to.

content.cn_text: 男:南代尔韦斯特米德路17号。
content.en_text: M: It's 17 Westmead Road, Annandale.

content.cn_text: L:能告诉我您的电话号码和传真号码吗?
content.en_text: L: And could I have your phone number and your fax number please?

content.cn_text: M:是的。传真号码是8号。
content.en_text: M: Yes. The fax number is eight .

content.cn_text: 男:没错。白天的电话号码是2577963663，下午5点以后是5791857在你听到剩下的对话之前，你有时间看第四题到第六题，现在仔细听并回答第四题到第六题。
content.en_text: M: That's correct. The daytime phone number is oh two five seven nine six three six three and after 5:00 p.m. it's 5791857 before you hear the rest of the conversation you have some time to look at questions four to six now listen carefully and answer questions four to six .

content.cn_text: L:现在我可以问一下你为什么需要这些书吗?对此我很抱歉，但我们必须有这些信息，无论何时我们通过电话发出图书请求。
content.en_text: L: Now may I ask why you'll be needing the books? I'm sorry about this, but we have to have this information whenever we send books out from a telephone request .

content.cn_text: M:没问题。我正在为当地报纸的环境观察栏目准备一篇短文。我们非常担心我们现在面临的问题，特别是在我们这个地区接待了这么多游客之后。
content.en_text: M: No problem. I'm preparing a short article for the environment watch section of the local newspaper. We're quite concerned about the prob¬lems we're facing here now,especially since we've been getting so many tourists in the district .

content.cn_text: L:哦，我知道。我很高兴有人在做一些事情来宣传这个问题。M:我可以借这些书多久?
content.en_text: L: Oh I know. I'm so glad someone is doing something about publicizing the problem.M: Now how long can I keep the books for?

content.cn_text: 李:嗯，你知道我们正常的贷款期限是三周，电话贷款可以延期两周。但是，如果我们通过邮寄方式寄送书籍，我们允许较长的初始借阅期，以允许交付时间。所以你可以从邮资之日起六周内拥有这些书。但恐怕两周的延期不适用。但是，如果没有其他人对它们有保留，您可以通过带它们来加盖印章来续借它们。
content.en_text: L: Well, as you know our normal loan period is three weeks with a two week extension over the phone. However, in cases where we send books out by post we allow a longer initial loan period to allow for the delivery time. So you may have the books for six weeks from the date of postage . But I'm afraid the two-week extension won't apply then.However, you would be able to renew them by bringing them in for stamping , provided no one else has a reserve on them.

content.cn_text: M:我想正常的月经期就足够了。那么您希望邮费和影印费如何支付呢?
content.en_text: M: I should think the normal period will be enough. Now how do you prefer the postageand photocopy fees to be paid?

content.cn_text: 李:我们既接受现金，也接受信用卡，但金额太小，寄汇票可能会更方便些。
content.en_text: L: We accept both cash and credit card , but it will be such a small sum it might be more convenient to send us a money order.

content.cn_text: M:嗯。我可以把它留到下次来的时候再付现金吗?L:当然可以。这完全没有问题。
content.en_text: M: Hm. Would it be alright if I left it until I come in next time and mat pay cash then?L: Of course. There's no problem with that at all.

content.cn_text: M:我先告诉你我要抄的文章好吗?
content.en_text: M: Shall I tell you the articles I want copied first?

content.cn_text: L:好。我都记下来了。现在也许我们可以继续看书了。你告诉我你需要的书，我会告诉你我们是马上就能买到，还是你要等一会儿才能买到，好吗?我需要的详细信息是作者、出版日期和书名。这样可以吗?M:是的，完全没问题。第一本是霍尔特·沃斯写的，1978年出版。它叫《澳大利亚土地和水资源》。
content.en_text: L: Good. I've got all that down. Now perhaps we could go on to the books. You tell me the books you need and I'll tell you whether we have them immediately available or whether you'll have to wait a bit for them, alright? The details I'll need are the author, the publication date and the title of the book. Is that OK?okay M: Yes, no problem at all. Um,the first one is by holt worth , published in 1978. It's called Land and Water Resources of australia .

content.cn_text: 李:嗯。是的。我们的货架上就有。
content.en_text: L: Hm. Yes. We have that available on the shelves.

content.cn_text: M:很好。接下来的两个都是政府出版物。第一本相当古老，出版于1984年。这是澳大利亚的土地退化，但第二个是最近的。那是1993年的海岸带调查报告。
content.en_text: M: Good. Now the next two are both government publications. The first one is rather old, published in 1984 . That's Land Degradation in Aus¬tralia , but the second one is more recent.  That's Coastal Zone Inquiry Report from 1993.

content.cn_text: L:恐怕第一种我们没有。我们得从政府档案里找出来，但第二个，也就是后面那个，有历史，所以我把它放在一边。
content.en_text: L: I'm afraid we don't have the first one. We'd have to get that from the government archives for you, but the second one, the later one, has hist, come in so I'll put that aside for you.

content.cn_text: M:太棒了。现在又多了三个。两本相当老的书，但它们是标准作品，所以你们可能有。费希尔的《环境法》和雷斯韦尔的《环境化学》。它们都出版于1980年。
content.en_text: M: Wonderful. Now there are three more. Two rather old books, but they're standard works so you probably have them. Environmental Law by Fisher, and Environmental Chemistry by Raiswell. They were both published in 1980 .

content.cn_text: L:是的，这两篇文章我们都有。环境法应该被束之高阁，但环境化学目前却被借出去了。我会为你保留的。
content.en_text: L: Yes, we do have both those texts. Environmental Law should be on the shelf, but Environmental chemistry is out on loan at the moment. I'll put that on reserve for you.

content.cn_text: M:对的。最后一本是《旅行和旅游业的环境影响》，作者是M. bum And Associates, 1989年。
content.en_text: M: Right. And the last one is The Environment impact of Travel and Tourism by M. Bums and Associates, 1989 .

content.cn_text: 李:(慢慢地)伯恩斯，环境影响，没有，很抱歉我们没有，我得通过馆际互借服务帮你借。
content.en_text: L: (slowly) Burns, Environment Impact… No I'm sorry we don't have that, I'll have to use the inter-library loan service and get it in for you.

content.cn_text: M:哦。这可能需要多长时间?
content.en_text: M: Oh. How long is that likely to take?

content.cn_text: L:嗯，这取决于我们在哪里能买到。如果在当地可以买到，应该不会超过几天的时间，但如果我们必须把它送到海外，那可能需要一段时间。我们会尽力加快速度的。
content.en_text: L: Well, it really depends where we can get it. If it's available locally it shouldn't take more than a few days, but if we have to send overseas for it, it could be rather a while. We'll do our best to hurry it up.

groups.desc:
Questions 1-3
Complete the form below.
Write A NUMBER for each answer.
REQUEST FORM

items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于准确听取数字并理解填表规则。首先，你需要注意听到"membership number"后跟随的数字。虽然对话中librarian最初听错并重复了"M 930"，但Mackie随后纠正并完整地说出了正确的号码。正确答案是9301274，而不是包含字母M的完整编号。这是因为在填表时，通常只需填写数字部分。要注意的是，答案中包括了最初被遗漏的"9"。做这类题目时，要集中精力听数字，特别是说话人重复的内容，因为重复通常意味着这是正确信息。同时，要学会辨别并忽略错误信息，如librarian最初的错误重复。记住，在听力考试中，保持注意力集中并快速捕捉关键信息是非常重要的。

这道题的关键在于准确识别和记录传真号码。当你听到"fax number"这个词组时，要立即提高警惕，因为答案即将出现。在对话中，图书管理员重复了完整的传真号码"863 5923"，而Mackie随后确认了这个号码是正确的。这个重复和确认的过程强调了这个号码的重要性，也给了你额外的机会来捕捉这个信息。要注意区分传真号码和其他出现的数字序列，如电话号码。正确答案是完整的传真号码"863 5923"，而不是部分号码或其他数字序列。在做这类题目时，要培养快速识别关键信息和准确记录数字的能力，这对于提高雅思听力成绩至关重要。

这道题的关键在于准确识别时间信息和相应的电话号码。题目要求填写"After 5:00 p.m."的电话号码，而原文中明确提到"after 5:00 p.m. it's 5791857"。这里的"it's"指的就是电话号码。所以，正确答案是5791857。注意，这个号码与之前提到的白天电话号码不同，这就要求你在听力过程中要特别注意区分不同时间段的信息。此外，原文中使用了"after 5:00 p.m."这一关键短语，与题目中的表述完全一致，这为你定位正确答案提供了明确的线索。在做类似的题目时，要特别留意与时间相关的表述，因为它们往往会引出重要的信息变化。

groups.desc:
Questions 4-6
Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.

items.title: Why does the caller need the literature?
items.analysis: 文中明确提到说话者正在为当地报纸的环境观察栏目准备一篇短文。这直接对应了选项B "For a newspaper article"。准备报纸文章是说话者需要这些文献资料的主要原因，因此B是最准确的答案。

items.title: How long can the caller have the books after the date of posting?
items.analysis: 文中图书馆员明确指出，对于邮寄借阅的情况，考虑到邮寄时间，他们允许更长的初始借阅期限。具体来说，借阅者可以从邮寄之日起保留书籍六周。这直接对应了题干中询问的"after the date of posting"可以保留多长时间，因此正确答案是6周。

items.title: How will the caller pay the fees?
items.analysis: 图书管理员虽然提到了现金和信用卡作为可接受的支付方式，但随后建议使用汇票，认为这可能更方便。这表明汇票是图书管理员推荐的支付方式，因此C选项（Money order）是正确答案。此外，管理员使用了"might be more convenient"这样的表达，暗示了对汇票支付方式的倾向。

groups.desc:
Questions 7-10
Look at the booklist below.
Write in the boxes the appropriate letters (A, OL or R) as explained below.

content: Hallsworth, E.G. (1978) Land and Water Resources Of Australia
Government publication (1984) Land Degradation in Australia
Government publication (1998) Coastal Zone Inquiry Report

items.analysis: 图书馆没有这本1984年出版的《Land Degradation in Australia》，需要从政府档案馆获取。这表明该书不在图书馆内，也不是被借出，而是需要从其他地方请求。因此，正确答案是R（request from other library）。
文中明确表示图书馆没有这本书（"don't have"），并且需要从政府档案馆获取。这表明该书不在图书馆中，需要从其他地方请求。因此，正确答案是R（request from other library），因为图书馆需要从外部源（在这里是政府档案馆）获取这本书。
文中明确提到"Environmental Law should be on the shelf"，表示这本书当前在图书馆的书架上可供借阅。这直接对应选项A "available in the library"，因此A是正确答案。图书馆工作人员确认了这本书的可用性，并没有提到需要从其他图书馆请求或者已经被借出，所以排除了其他选项。
文中明确指出"Environmental Chemistry is out on loan at the moment"，即《环境化学》这本书目前已经被借出。这直接对应了选项OL（out on loan），表示书籍当前不在图书馆，而是被其他读者借走了。因此，OL是正确答案。
